name: single-file off-by-one in average()

bugs_injected.description: average() divides by len(nums) - 1 instead of len(nums). Any non-single-element input yields the wrong mean; the failing test test_average_of_three pins it.

notes: The devil is not expected to flag blocker on this rung — the worker's diff should be a clean 1-line fix, giving devil nothing to catch. If devil IS flagging the worker's fix, that's a devil calibration bug surfacing here.
